hero.title: readme.so
hero.tagline: Readme.so is an online editor to help developers make readmes for their project.
hero.description: An online drag-and-drop editor to easily build READMEs

highlights.title: Built Around Clear Themes
highlights.description: Tagged around markdown, nextjs, react, tailwindcss so visitors understand the project fast.

highlights.title: Grounded In The Actual Stack
highlights.description: The page reflects the repository's real implementation, led by JavaScript (95%), CSS (5%), Dockerfile (0%), Shell (0%).

highlights.title: Shareable By Default
highlights.description: A repo link becomes a cleaner page with quick context, proof signals, and a better first read.

features: Choose from list of sections to add to your readme
